label: LMCD1+ mural cell
resolved_names: LIM and cysteine-rich domains 1 positive mural cell
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'LMCD1+ mural cell' as a fine-grained annotation under the broad 'Mural cell' category in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3, cell_type_annotations.json). LMCD1 (LIM and cysteine-rich domains 1) is a transcriptional cofactor involved in cardiac and vascular development. This likely represents a pericyte-like mural cell subtype.
